blended.narrative: Dodge Ridge is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 61°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 45".
